payload.title: Joint Minutes of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority, the New York City Transit Authority, the Manhattan and Bronx Surface Transit Operating Authority, the Staten Island Rapid Transit Operating Authority, the Metropolitan Suburban Bus Authority, the Triborough Bridge and Tunnel Authority, the Long Island Rail Road Company, Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company, MTA Construction and Development Company, the MTA Bus Company, Grand Central Madison Operating Company, and the First Mutual Transportation Assurance Company
payload.description: Joint meeting minutes of the MTA Board and Committees (TBTA, Joint Railroad, New York City Transit, Capital Program, Audit and Finance Committees) held January 28, 2026 at 2 Broadway, New York

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 project advancement including tunneling contract award with approximately $700 million in labor savings and $1.3 billion in total identified savings. Exploration of extending tunnel boring machine west across 125th Street (Q West project).
Formal kickoff of design and engineering for the Interborough Express project, with anticipated collaboration with the City.
Substantial completion of the OMNY fare payment system in 2025, achieving 98 percent adoption following the sunset of the MetroCard.
Design-build project to replace an 85-year-old facility with a modern depot capable of housing 272 buses, supporting full electrification and high-voltage infrastructure.

tool_args.label: MTA 2025 total ridership - nearly 2 billion trips

payload.raw_value_text: almost two billion trips taken on New York City Transit, subway, bus and paratransit all together
payload.scope: New York City Transit (subway, bus and paratransit)

payload.raw_value_text: up 7% from 2024

issues: metric_claim payload with raw_value_text should include normalized numeric value or value_min/value_max

payload.raw_value_text: Overall subway crime down 14% compared to 2019

tool_args.label: Subway customer satisfaction 62% - highest to date

payload.raw_value_text: now at 62%, which is a 13% increase over a year ago
82.8% weekday on-time performance
bus speeds continued to increase, up 1.2% year-over-year

issues: metric_claim payload with raw_value_text should include normalized numeric value or value_min/value_max

payload.raw_value_text: 95.4% of weekday trips meeting the thirty minute on-time performance threshold
7.2 million riders, which is 94% of December 2019
81,946,669, representing 6.5 million more customers over the prior year, which represents 8.5% growth from 2024 ridership, and 90% of 2019 ridership
LIRR achieved a 96.17% total OTP in 2025
LIRR achieved a fare not-collected rate of 2.9%
up 7% from 2024
bus speeds continued to increase, up 1.2% year-over-year
Metro-North delivered 74.4 million rides, up 6% from 2024

tool_args.label: Metro-North OTP above 97.8% for sixth consecutive year

payload.raw_value_text: For the sixth consecutive year, OTP was above 97.8%

tool_args.label: TBTA record toll revenue $3.3 billion in 2025

payload.raw_value_text: TBTA's toll facilities collected a record $3.3 billion in revenue

tool_args.label: TBTA traffic levels 339 million vehicle crossings in 2025

payload.raw_value_text: traffic levels reached 339 million vehicle crossings

tool_args.label: TBTA total support to mass transit $2.2 billion

payload.raw_value_text: Total support to MTA mass transit, including from the CRZ, is $2.2 billion

tool_args.label: C&D record $15.8 billion in contract awards in 2025

payload.raw_value_text: C&D achieved a record $15.8 billion in contract awards, more than double the agency's five-year average since 2020

payload.description: MTA operated through Winter Storm Fern while other major transit agencies on the Eastern Seaboard were unable to maintain service.
65th anniversary of the opening of the Throgs Neck Bridge
Joint meeting of MTA Board and Committees adjourned

tool_args.label: New fare and ticketing changes effective January 4, 2026

payload.description: New fare and ticketing changes took effect on January 4 for LIRR and Metro-North, including extended fare validity, day pass introduction, and free ticket redemption.

tool_args.label: 2025 safest year on subways in a generation

payload.claim_text: 2025 was also the safest year on the subways in a generation
payload.subject: subway safety

tool_args.label: Congestion pricing first full year - delivering on goals

payload.claim_text: Congestion pricing has delivered and continues to deliver on all of the stated goals -- less traffic; faster travel, especially in and out of the crossings to Manhattan, whether you're on a bus or driving; safer streets; better air quality; and -- soon enough -- better transit
payload.subject: congestion pricing

tool_args.label: TBTA in-house cost savings of more than $5 million

payload.claim_text: In-house cost savings efforts by TBTA's Intelligent Transportation Systems and Central Maintenance Divisions resulted in savings of more than $5 million
payload.subject: TBTA cost savings

payload.raw_value_text: LIRR operated a total of 321,198 trains, a record
LIRR achieved... efficiencies of $71M in fiscal savings

tool_args.label: Metro-North Waterbury Branch ridership 147% of 2019 levels

payload.raw_value_text: Waterbury Branch ridership reached 147% of 2019 levels

tool_args.label: LIRR/MNR fare and ticketing - $3.1M in customer savings

payload.raw_value_text: customers on both railroads have saved almost $3.1 million dollars
Compared to 2024, total collisions-per-million-crossings declined by 12%

tool_args.label: $5 billion of 2025 C&D awards from Congestion Relief revenues

payload.raw_value_text: $5 billion consisted of projects made possible through Congestion Relief revenues

tool_args.label: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 tunneling contract $700M labor savings, $1.3B total savings

payload.raw_value_text: award of the tunneling contract with approximately $700 million in labor savings and $1.3 billion in total identified savings to date

issues: metric_claim payload with raw_value_text should include normalized numeric value or value_min/value_max

tool_args.label: $6.7 billion in C&D project completions in 2025

payload.raw_value_text: $6.7 billion in project completions in 2025
completion of 39 subway elevator replacements and two railroad elevator replacements in 2025

tool_args.label: MTA Audit completed 80 audits and identified $11.5M in savings

payload.raw_value_text: MTA Audit completed 80 operational, financial and technology audits and identified $11.5 million in potential savings and cost efficiencies

tool_args.label: SAS Phase 2 tunneling contract $700M labor savings

payload.raw_value_text: award of the tunneling contract with approximately $700 million in labor savings
payload.scope: Second Avenue Subway Phase 2 tunneling contract

payload.raw_value_text: $1.3 billion in total identified savings to date
10 stations were made accessible in 2025, seven subway stations and three Long Island Rail Road stations
a 17-week service shutdown to facilitate major reconstruction... completed successfully in May of last year

tool_args.label: Rockaway Line resiliency project estimated $584M completion cost

payload.raw_value_text: estimated completion cost of $584 million
payload.scope: Rockaway Line resiliency and viaduct rehabilitation

tool_args.label: Elevated structures painting project $217M estimated completion cost

payload.raw_value_text: estimated completion cost of $217 million
payload.scope: Painting and structural steel repairs on elevated structures (Jamaica Line and Canarsie Line)

tool_args.label: New fare gate prototypes being tested across 9 stations, doubling soon

payload.claim_text: New fare gate prototypes are getting a lot of attention... three different models being tested across nine stations. That number of stations is going to double in the weeks to come. More than 2 million people have used them so far
payload.subject: fare gate prototypes

tool_args.label: New faregates to be installed in 150 stations as part of 2025-2029 Capital Program

payload.claim_text: Ultimately new faregates will be installed in 150 stations as part of our 2025-2029 Capital Program. The selected stations will account for over 70% of MTA ridership.
payload.subject: fare gate installation plan

tool_args.label: MTA C&D implements Second Avenue Subway Phase 2
MTA C&D implements Jamaica Bus Depot Replacement

payload.description: Chair Lieber called to order the January joint meeting of the MTA Board and Committees (TBTA, Joint Railroad, New York City Transit, Capital Program, Audit and Finance Committees)

tool_args.label: TBTA provided toll revenue support to MTA mass transit

payload.description: TBTA delivered another year of record-breaking toll revenue and support to MTA mass transit. Total support to MTA mass transit, including from the CRZ, is $2.2 billion
